audio.generateSfxTitle: Yi amfani da gida LLM don karanta rubutu a matsayin wasan radio kuma ba da shawarar sunayen ingantaccen — sannan tabbatar da kiti da kake hannu. Ake saka su zuwa aikin lokaci-domin amsa.

audio.voicesTitle: Ba wani muryar da aka ɗuba ma kowane mai magana (yazawa manifest.voice.speaker_map).

createvoice.footerNote: Kwafai ta hanyar OmniVoice akan 2080 Ti. Tsuratsura ana kwafai zuwa 24kHz mono. Muryar da samma suna an canza.

createvoice.hintTestLine: (na raina — samarwa misali don ka ji kwafin)

createvoice.placeholderTestLine: Bar sunyi ba tare da wani nuni ba.

createvoice.workingMsg: Yana fara OmniVoice (farkon kwafai na jira iya ɗauki har zuwa ~3 min don jijiya GPU) da kwafai… nade wannan bubuwa.

filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.one: Shigidun nan ya kawo da {n} muryar azaman clip ƙwalliya. Sake kwafinta ta sake gina shi a wannan injin OmniVoice na injin kuma ta sake nuna {show}'s magana. Yana fara OmniVoice kuma yana amfani da GPU (~kaɗan tsabar). Za ka iya yi shi daga gida zaɓin muryar.
filemenu.cloneVoicesBody.other: Shigidun nan ya kawo da {n} muryoyi azaman clips ƙwalliya. Sake kwafinta ta rake gina su a wannan injin OmniVoice na injin kuma ta sake nuna {show}'s magana. Yana fara OmniVoice kuma yana amfani da GPU (~kaɗan tsabar kowa). Za ka iya yi shi daga gida zaɓin muryar.
filemenu.cloneVoicesFailed: Kasa: {names}. Sake yi shi daga zaɓin muryar da OmniVoice ya yi lafiya.
filemenu.exportAssetsCheckbox: Haɗa assets (muryoyi, SFX, kiɗa) — girki zip
filemenu.exportBody: Bundles show text (script, manifest, youtube) + title-card templates. Da assets a, yana haɗa da binary source da manifest yana tunawa shi — OmniVoice muryar ƙwalliya clips, SFX, da kiɗa — da provenance catalogs, don mai kasuwa iya shigida shi kuma bugun rigenerate buttons. Generated media (rendered video / final mp4) ba ma zama a)..
filemenu.exportVoiceHint: (Muryar gida iya fittar daga Sauti page's muryar zaɓin.)
filemenu.newEpisodeHint: Scaffolds manifest + script seeded daga nuni defaults. Sannan rubuta script kuma ceci Generate manifest.
filemenu.folderBody: Studio ba zai iya buɗe filemanger a na'uran da ya kunna ba — kwa salo daga waje, ko nasu mai aiki ba shi da interface. Filayen nuni suna gida akan hanyar nan a Studio na'ura:
filemenu.folderWindowsHint: Daga Windows, zuba wannan gida a File Explorer:
filemenu.newShowHint: Kashaye za su zama a sabuwar folder. Muryar/girki defaults an kwafi daga jarrumawa default nuni — baje su ƙarƙari Settings → Nuni metadata.
filemenu.shutdownBody: Wannan yana sakowa GPU — yana tsayar da ComfyUI, OmniVoice, da Ollama containers — sannan yana tsayar da server din Studio. Don amfani da Studio kuma za ka buƙatar fara shi daga terminal (<0>{cmd}</0>, ko systemd service).
filemenu.shuttingDown: MACU Studio yana sakowa GPU kuma yana tsayar…
filemenu.shuttingDownBody: Za ka iya rufar tab din browser yanzu. Fara Studio kuma daga terminal idan ka so komowa.
graphics.bespokeCardDesc: wannan an rubuta shi azaman bayanai, ba daga ajiye tsarin, saboda babu filayen da za a iya sarrafa tukuna. Zaɓi tsarin a ƙarƙashi + cika rubutu don sa shi editable (ko tsara sabuwar tsarin tare da AI).
graphics.bespokeHint: Nuna "Saita" (ba "Saɓa") saboda wannan karti an rubuta shi azaman bayanai, ba daga tsarin da za a iya sarrafa. Saita shi koli don sa shi Saɓa-nable.
graphics.bespokeNoLayout: kaɗai — babu tsarin da za a iya sarrafa
graphics.briefPlaceholder: e.g. a Crater Bowl scoreboard: SECTOR NINE SLAGS vs SECTOR FOUR GLOWBOYS, girma lambar fintsi ticking 2 → 1, 'PLAYERS REMAINING' a ƙarƙashi
graphics.cantRenameHint: — ba a iya mayar da suna; sabuwa karti don canja id
graphics.cardBlurb.freshTitle: Rubunta koli ta kowane jiya (intro layout). AI yana rubuta manyan layin ubanta gida (gajeriya, duk-capital, mai tsoro) + kicker + logline daga rubutu.
graphics.cardBlurb.macuTitle: A buɗɗe mai sake dawowa (intro layout). Wordmark an ɗaure da "THE MACU / REPORT"; AI ya rubuta ne ɗan kicker tease + station-ID sub.
graphics.cardBlurb.weather: Yankin kasua (weather layout). Ranar yau mai tsoro jiya a baje na zamani.
graphics.cardConfigureTitle: Saita — wannan karti ba shi da tsarin da za a iya sarrafa tukuna; saita shi don sa shi regen-able
graphics.cardRegenTitle: Saɓa — saɓa daga ajiye tsarin + filayen
graphics.cardTypeNote: Karti nau'i kawai ma'ana idan kun taɓa "Rubuta rubutu tare da AI" — yana zaɓi baba, waɗanne filayen za su rubuta, da snap tsarin zuwa karti nau'i's composition. Rubuta filayen kanka kula da shi.
graphics.compGeneratedSuccess: tsarin "{key}" an sabuwa da zaɓa a sama — yanzu cika rubutu a jiya 3.
graphics.configureBtnTitle: Wannan karti ba shi da ajiye tsarin/rubutu tukuna — saita shi koli, sai ya zama Saɓa-able
graphics.createPendingBriefTitle: Kun rubuta bayani a jiya 2 — taɓa 'Sabuwa tsarin' na farko, ko share bayani don amfani da zaɓa tsarin
graphics.designWithAiHelp: Aiki kawai lokacin babu tsarin a sama da ji. Bayar bayani karti; jiya jiya (Qwen) yana rubuta sabuwar HyperFrames tsarin da safi shi a ƙarƙashi da suna daga jiya 1. Kuna har yanzu cika rubutu a jiya 3.
graphics.designWithAiSummary: ✨ ko tsara sabuwar tsarin gida tare da AI
graphics.editBtnTitle: Sarrafa wannan karti's tsarin ko rubutu, sai ga saɓa
graphics.editModalFooterHint: Safi sauye-sauye ku da saɓa karti.
graphics.genCompBtnTitle: Sabuwa sabuwar HyperFrames tsarin daga wannan bayani, ajiye a ƙarƙashi da suna a jiya 1
graphics.generateFirstWarning: Taɓa "Sabuwa composition" don gina wannan tsarin. Har sai kun yi, "Sabuwa + saɓa" yana amfani da zaɓa tsarin a sama da yin watsi da wannan bayani.
graphics.nameFirstWarning: ↑ maye karti a jiya 1 na farko — ya zama sabuwar tsarin suna.
graphics.newModalFooterHint: Safi karti da saɓa shi azaman mp4.
graphics.noTitleSelected: Babu ubansa zaɓa — zaɓi daya daga kartu a gida.
graphics.regenBtnTitle: Saɓa wannan karti daga nusa tsarin + filayen
graphics.renderMissingBtn: Saɓa waɗanda ba a samu ba
graphics.sharedFileNotFound: kasuwa raba/titles/ — fayil ba a samu ba
graphics.step1Hint: Gajeriya id, amfani azaman sunaye. e.g. lower_third, scoreboard.
graphics.step2Hint: A "composition" shine jiya template — yana yanke inda rubutu ya zauna da kuma ta motsi. Duba yana nuni da zaɓa tsarin; ‹TOKENS› yana tanda inda jiya 3 rubutu ya gida.
graphics.step3Hint: Wadannan darajar suni ‹TOKENS› a tsarin. Rubuta su, ko bari AI rubuta su daga jiya rubutu.
graphics.thumbClickTitle: Taɓa don fadada · duba nau'uka · ga tsarin + filayen
graphics.thumbModalDesc: Saɓa youtube_thumb composition zuwa final/{slug}_thumb.png. Jiya thumbnail an ajiye na farko.
graphics.writeTextBtnTitle: Rubuta rubutu a ƙarƙashi daga jiya rubutu, a ƙarƙashi da karti nau'i baba
graphics.writeThumbBtnTitle: Rubuta punchy tsaro-tsaro thumbnail kaka tare da jiya local LLM (Ollama)
localize.busyOrUnrendered: yin ganinsa jiya kafin lokaci, ko jira don yin ganinsa da akwai yanzu
localize.haikuNote: Don mafi kyawu juyar da kankamanci, bugi Claude a cikin drawer na terminal — babu cloud hook a cikin app.
localize.renderFirst: Yin ganinsa jiya kafin lokaci ƙari — gida jiya tana amfani da hotuna da subtitle da aka gama, saboda haka ita ce ire mai kumsa.
localize.runningNote: Kowane harshe ya fuzunta a jerin GPU, daya a lokaci. Kuna iya rufe hakan — yana ci gaba.
localize.title: Gida jiya — subtitle + dubbing

script.generateTitle: Sake bugi script.md zuwa manifester cues (gani kafin rubuta)
script.mergeHelp: Cues ana sake bugi daga <0>script.md</0> kuma aka haɗa; maka mai sauti, ƙararren halaye, b-roll, comfyui/style/kiɗi kuma abubuwan da ake gabatarwa an adana. <1>manifest.json.bak</1> mai alamar lokaci ana rubuta kafin amsa.
script.modeDiffTitle: Kwatanta nau'ikan da aka saba (haske da aka ƙara / ja wanda aka yanke)
script.noChangesDetail: Rubutu yayi daidai da manifester — babu abin da za a rubuta.
script.noDiffChanges: Babu sauye tsakanin waɗannan nau'ikan biyu.
script.noVersionsYet: Babu nau'ikan da aka saba a yanzu. Bugi git sync button don ƙwantar da rubutu, sannan koma nema daidaita.
script.oneVersionOnly: Nau'i ɗaya ne kawai zuwa yanzu ({label}). Saba a sake bugi nemi daidaita.
script.renumbered: ⚠ sake lambar (VO cache na iya sake gina)

settings.git.stub: Saita nesa Adireshi da rashin da Studio yana daidaita rubutu/fihiristi/youtube zuwa. Imaili suna amfani da maɓalli SSH na akwati. Ana zuwa nan gida.

sfx.helpMusicNoRender: ba zai gudna ba a lokacin render
sfx.phAgenPrompt: misali: 'heavy iron door slam, dry, close mic'
sfx.phMusicPrompt: misali: 'sickly lo-fi big-band waltz, tape hiss, mono'

sfxgen.gain.label: g
sfxgen.gain.title: karɓa — 0–1 madaidaita
sfxgen.idle.body: Karanta rubutu azaman radio play kuma ba da shawara sauti — fabara ta kit ɗin da kake da shi.
sfxgen.idle.hint: Danna Fara don fara — yana bugun Ollama akan GPU, ~30-60s.
sfxgen.loading.body: Yana neman lokacin local LLM (Qwen2.5-7B) don karanta rubutu azaman radio play…
sfxgen.review.empty: Babu tsofaffar sauti — tsarin ya yarda rubutu ba ya bukaca komai, ko komai ƙi-a saita.
sfxgen.review.helpText: Amfani ya saka waɗannan cikin sauti timeline (manifest.sfx[]) kaman jefa-jefa — per-gap delays an sani-sani. Karɓargarji tasiri yana aiki nan-nan; "don karɓa" tasiri shine placeholders har sai ka fita su (Karɓargarji → Ƙara → Freesound) a gida da aka nuna; render yana tsallake sauti komai ba jiya a disk.
sfxgen.section.acquire: BUKACI SAMAR DA ({count}) — buga bugun, fita daga karɓargarji jiya
sfxgen.section.existing: AMFANI DA SFX NA JIB ({count}) — dabe-dabe a kit
sfxgen.title: SAMAR DA JERIN SFX
sfxgen.toast.applied: SFX jeri ya amfani — {placed} saita ({reused} daga karɓargarji{acq})
shotgen.applyFootnote: Aiwatar bugi zube jerin hotaye[] da rubutu sabuwa char/b-roll defs. Sake amfani mafaka a ci gida core + ijaye.
shotgen.emptyAllFilled: Duka jerin akwai gida hotaye — babu abin cika. Bugi akwashi a sama ne sake zube duka jirgin.
shotgen.emptyNoShots: Model ba shi ƙera hotaye. Jejeƴa.
shotgen.errorGpuBusy: GPU dana — sake yi aktif. Jejeƴa sa lokacin bahakar.
shotgen.loadingMain: Bukaru local LLM (Qwen2.5-7B) ne zube hotaye…
shotgen.onlyMissingLabel: Shaye jerin babu hotaye ne kawai
shotgen.onlyMissingTooltip: A kan: shaye jerin babu hotaye ne (ba za amu taɓa jerin da sauni ne). A bugi: sake zube duka jerin (bugi hotaye da sauyi).
shotgen.sectionNewChars: SABUWA jerin char — ƙera (gyara core idan kike so)
shotgen.title: ƘERA JERIN HOTON

topbar.gitSyncTitle: Daidaita rubutu + fayil + youtube.txt zuwa git
topbar.stopConfirm: SAKACIN BINCIKI - kashe sauri mai aiki, share ComfyUI queue, da sace GPU ajiya?
topbar.stopTitle: Sauri sakacin: kashe sauri mai aiki, share ComfyUI queue, da sace GPU ajiya
topbar.syncDotPending: Sauye waɗanda ba a shigar ne - ba a daidaita su ga git
topbar.updateTitle: Sabuntawa akwai samu — {behind} sabuwar commit(s). Taɓa don duba da shiryawa.
tour.assembly.body: Falon bukattar jaji. Aiki bukattar pipeline cikakke-cikakke zuwa bidiyon amma tamma, tare da bukazin baba per-stage. Shi nawa haukakin - bada basira ta dadewa.
tour.assembly.title: Haɗin
tour.audio.body: Per-cue muryar kwana — bugi ta, sake samar line, kuma jeka sunayen ingantaccen a tsakanin cues.
tour.audio.title: VO
tour.docs.body: Canon — halaye bible, bayanan shawarar, kuma bayanan pipeline. Bayani, ba gyara.
tour.docs.title: Docs
tour.episodePicker.body: Zaɓi jirgan; ◀ ▶ kibiyoyin ci gaba tsakanin su. Ɓama shi ne git-sync yafi — jage shi ne aka tura, ja shi ne sauye na gida.
tour.episodePicker.title: Zaɓin jirgan
tour.gitSync.body: Ƙidayar jirgan nan - rubutu, manifester, youtube.txt - zuwa ajiye kuma tura ta. Abubuwan da ake bugi na yi a gida; wannan shi ne ajibaw tushe.
tour.gitSync.title: Git saba
tour.graphics.body: Karatun bajajeniya da kan saman alloye. Rubuta karatun jajin kuma aiki jikunkiran da ake daidaita akan bidiyo.
tour.graphics.title: Zane
tour.projectMenu.body: Sababbin ko bubuwa dabbobi kuma jirga, shigo/fita aiki, kuma saituna — duka a nan. Studio za ta iya riƙe da yawa dabbobi a yanzu.
tour.projectMenu.title: Menun aiki
tour.ready.body: Ka shirya - farawa ta ƙirƙira sabuwar dabbo daga asali: bubuwa menun aiki kuma zaɓi Sabuwar dabbo.... Sake bubuwa wannan tours a daidai asali. Ku yi nishaɗi.
tour.ready.title: A shirye don farawa
tour.script.body: Rubuta jirgan a Markdown, sannan bugi Samar da manifester don sake cacar su zuwa cues pipeline na iya aiki.
tour.script.title: Rubutu
tour.video.body: Jerin harkokin — kowane halaye kuma b-roll clips. Aiki waɗanda babu ko tsohuwar; gani yana nuna kowane sakamakon.
tour.video.title: Bidiyo
tour.publish.body: Tashin sakamako: kammala jerin aiki don gida — taken, bayanai, hoton, haɗin video, da wace ƙarni za ta iya ganin — sannan Aika don aika zuwa mayorawesome.com.
tour.publish.title: Aika
update.dirtyWarning: Wannan checkout yana da local changes — auto-sabunta an dakatar don canji. Commit ko discard su (ko sabunta daga terminal) na farko.
update.idleHint: Danna "Dubawa sabuntawa" don neman gida sabunta.
update.gpuBusyBody: Da alama GPU din yana aiki ({free} MiB baki) — render yana aiki. Sabuntawa sake gina kuma sake fara Studio, wanda zai iya katse wannan aiki. Kai ka tiyar kan sabunta kuma sake fara yanzu?
update.phaseBuilding: Sabuntawa (deps + UI)… wannan zai iya ɗaukar dakika.
update.phaseRestartNeeded: Sabunta ya gina. Sake fara server ta hannu don karɓa shi.
update.phaseRestarting: Sake fara — page zai reload kanta.
update.title: Sabuntawa software
update.updateHint: "Sabunta & sake fara" pulls, gina sabunta UI, kuma sake fara service (~1 min). Page ta reload kanta lokacin da ta koma.
versions.promoteTitle: Ɗaga wannan version zuwa kai tsaye
video.addShotHelp: Yana ƙara {kind} maɓalli a fihiristi. Jera shi daga JERIN HARKOKIN.
video.addShotHelpWithCue: Yana ƙara {kind} maɓalli a fihiristi da harko zuwa @{cue}. Jera shi daga JERIN HARKOKIN.
video.emptyManifest: Babu harkokin jiya ko alaaba a cikin fihiristi.
video.generateShotListTitle: Yi amfani da LLM na gida don ba da shawarwari game da jerin harkokin daga rubutu (sake amfani da harkokin da suka sake)
video.precacheTitle: Loda duka harkokin bide da aka jera zuwa bayyanin yanar gida don hoto na gaggawa ta hanyar Cloudflare proxy
video.renderAllMissing: Yi kadarwa duka da ba su da ladi/ba su fito
video.seedVersionReadOnly: Seed na siga da ake kallonsa (ba za a iya canza ba)
voicepicker.castVoicesSubtitle: — keɓa muryar da aka kwafi kwa kowane harko
voicepicker.exportVoiceTitle: Zazzage tsuratsura da aka birgima ta {name} — sake-shigarwa akan wata na'ura
voicepicker.noCharacters: Babu harkokin har yanzu — ƙara ɗaya ƙasa, ko Generate fihiristi don zaa su daga rubutu.
voicepicker.omnivoiceStopped: OmniVoice tsayawa — kwafi ko jera don jera murya
youtube.captions.clientHelp: Lokaci daya: ƙirƙiri OAuth client na nau'i "TVs and Limited Input devices" a cikin abin n'iya na Google Cloud (wanda ke da YouTube Data API a buɗewa), sannan bushe ID da sirri nasu a nan.
youtube.captions.noTracks: Babu wajajen alaƙalake har yanzu — sake jiya jerin wannan a farko.
youtube.captions.noVideo: Babu video na YouTube da ya dace da jerin wannan.
youtube.captions.quotaNote: Kowane tuɓa yana amfani da kusan 400 na iyaliwa na YouTube kwanaki-kwanaki (~25 tuɓoɓi a ranar a kan iyaliwar ajiya ta tsakiya).
youtube.captions.title: Alaƙalake
youtube.captions.waiting: Jira kaɗai da ke samun izini…
youtube.notConfiguredBody: Ƙara API key + channel id zuwa <0>~/.config/macu-studio/youtube.json</0> (ko saitun <1>YOUTUBE_API_KEY</1> / <2>YOUTUBE_CHANNEL_ID</2>) don nuna daidaitun bubuwan ake turawa a nan.
filemenu.macuWebConnectHint: A kan mayorawesome.com, bugi ninka → Sarrafa → Haɗa MACU Studio → Samar haɗin token, kwafai shi, kuma ɗora shi a nan. Yana haɗa ditin nesa da shaferun aiki a isastaccen mataki.
filemenu.macuWebConnectedHint: An haɗa zuwa <0>{base}</0>. Lokacin da aka zaɓi jerin abubuwa zai kamata a zama jama'a; waɗanda ba a zaɓa ba ana turawa amma akwai boye a matsayin daftarori. Sannan Bugawa.
toast.macuWebCommitted: an ɗora gida ({files} fayiloli) — saita shaferun aiki don turawa
publish.connectHint: Laafi alambar haɗin ku (Shafin Sarrafa a mayorawesome.com → Haɗi MACU Studio).
publish.publishHint: Gyara filayen sama, sa'an nan buga su ga shafin.
publish.ytNoMatch: Babu kanɗa da yayi daidai da sauni na wannan kashi.
publish.videoHint: MACU Web ba ya ajiyin bideo - laafi hanyar inda take (YouTube). Ana sa shi a shafin kashi.
publish.fieldDescription: Bayanai (ana nuna shi a shafin kashi)
publish.thumbNone: Babu hotunan da aka yin sosai - tuba aiki (mataki 5) farko.
tour.mcp.title: Kawo da ajancinki mai
tour.mcp.body: Studio kuma shine MCP server — komai a cikin jerin wannan gida abu ne dan aikin AI ake iya kirawa. Nuna Claude Code ko Claude Desktop zuwa http://localhost:8774/mcp kuma aiki ya zama jita-jita gida: rubuta rubutu, jefa muryoyi, fito, aika. Duba Connect-an-agent gida don saitacciyar saita.
wizard.createFailed: ba'a iya ƙirƙira ɗan sari na aiki: {msg}
wizard.serviceDown: Sabis da wannan mataki ya buƙata ba shi aiki a yanzu. Za ka iya karya shi kuma duba later — adishi na kai an ajiye.
wizard.bannerHint: Sabo ga Studio? Ɗan ƴar jayayya mai jagora ce take ƙirƙira ɗan sari gaskiya.
wizard.welcome.title: Mu ƙira ɗan sari na farko na kai
wizard.welcome.body: Wannan jayayya take ƙirƙira ɗan sari gaskiya daga ɗaya zuwa karshe — rubutu, muryoyi, da fina-finai na ƙarshe — a cikin kusan mintuna goma sha biyar. Yana farawa ta ƙirƙira ɗan sari ɗan aiki a ɗan sari na al'ada na kai. Abin da ke nan ba shi taba tarbatarwa da sauran aikin ka.
wizard.welcome.goal: An ƙira ɗan sari na aiki
wizard.script.title: 1 · Rubuta rubutu
wizard.script.body: Mun bugi tashe ɗan rubatu mai ƙanƙanci. Kowane layi kamar **SUNA:** ya zama kirari mai jira, kowane ## masa ya fara ɗakin, kuma layi » shi ne shawarar gani. Karanta shi, sauya layi ko daya, ko rubuta naka — sannan danna Generate Manifest (gida dama) kuma Ɗaga da shi.
wizard.cast.title: 2 · Zaɓi muryoyi
wizard.cast.body: Kowa maye buƙata murya. Tashe ta fara ta bar NARRATOR kuma GUEST ba'a ba su murya — zaɓi murya ga kowa ta amfani da zaɓi murya kusa da sunansa. (Za ka iya karya shi: masu magana ba'a ba su murya za su yi amfani da murya-bakin saura.)
wizard.renderVo.title: 3 · Samare muryoyi
wizard.renderVo.body: Yanzu canza layuka zuwa muryoyi. Yi amfani da "Sake ɗakin" don samare kowa daya a lokaci ɗaya, ko samare butu akan ɗakin ɗaya, sannan danna ƴi don ji shi. Lissafin shine nawa ne aka gama.
wizard.sfx.title: 4 · Ɗabi'u kuma kiɗa (zaba)
wizard.sfx.body: Karya ɗan ƙarfi: ƙira shawarwari-ɗabi'u don jera tsakanin kirari, ko kunna gida kiɗa. Wannan mataki shine zaba — karye shi a kowane lokaci kuma ci gaba.
wizard.graphics.title: 5 · Karatun suloli (zaba)
wizard.graphics.body: Karatun suloli kuma ƙasan ƙasa an gina su nan daga HyperFrames abubuwa. Samare ɗaya don ganin yadda take kama. Zaba — karye idan ka fi so sauƙa.
wizard.shots.title: 6 · Fina-finan gani (zaba)
wizard.shots.body: Mataki na fina-finai ya canza shawarwarin gani na ka zuwa butu mai gajeren lokaci tare da ComfyUI. Yi amfani da "Generate shots" don shawarwa jerin gani, sannan samare ɗaya. Wannan buƙata sabis GPU — karye shi idan ba'a aiki.
wizard.assemble.title: 7 · Haɗa ɗan sari
wizard.assemble.body: Hadiya tana aiki cikin dukkanin jajjema — murya, fina-finai, kiɗa, rubuce — kuma ta rabu fina-finai na ƙarshe. Danna Run kuma kallon live log. Wannan shi ne mataki mai nauyi GPU — karye idan sabis ba'a aiki kuma koma later.
wizard.publish.title: 8 · Buga (a madadin jayayya)
wizard.publish.body: Lokacin da ɗan sari ya shiryar kuna iya bugawa shi zuwa sabon gida MACU kuma haɗa fina-finai YouTube nan. Ba za mu bug kome a lokacin jayayya — wannan shine kuma ka san inda ya zama. Sani a sa'a, sannan ci gaba.
wizard.done.title: Shi ne dukan madawwaki!
wizard.done.body: Ka canza rubutu zuwa ɗan sari na gama. Daga nan: gyara ɗan sari na aiki da kyau, fara gaskiya daya daga menu, ko bugi Docs don bayani na zurfafa. Za ka iya sake jayayya nan daga menu a kowane lokaci.
tour.theme.title: Sai ka sa nasa ka
tour.theme.body: Saɗi → Jiya (a cikin wannan menu) yana sake ƙayyada gida duka: terminal mai rauni tare da juna-juna rauni, suna kuma cikakke kallon - Starship, Wasteland, Slate Pro, Movie Palace, Dracula, da Pretty Princess. Sauya shi yawun taɗa kuma a tuna.
wizard.theme.title: Zaɓi kallon ka
wizard.theme.body: Kafin mun gina wani abu, sai ka sa gida ta naka. Buɗe menu aiki (bashi-hagu) → Saɗi → Jiya. Danna batu rauni akan Layin Terminal don jujjuyawar rauni mai sauri, ko jajaga jiya cikakke kamar Starship ko Movie Palace. Yana aiki nan kuma yana ajiye a wannan shamaki.
wizard.theme.goal: Zaɓi jiya duk wai - ko ka ci gida terminal mai rauni da kuma gida.
filemenu.archiveEpisodeBody: Ajiye <0>{slug}</0>? Wannan zai motsa fayilolin kashi daga jerin aiki zuwa folder din ajiye akan diski. Za ka iya dawo da shi daga Saiti → Ajiye.
filemenu.archiveShowBody: Ajiye <0>{show}</0> da duk kashinta? Wannan zai motsa shō gaba daya daga jerin aiki zuwa folder din ajiye akan diski. Za ka iya dawo da shi daga Saiti → Ajiye.
settings.archive.title: Kashina da shōwaye da aka ajiye
settings.archive.help: Abubuwan da aka ajiye an motsa su gaske daga jerin aiki zuwa folder din ajiye akan diski. Dawo da ɗaya don dawo da shi.
settings.archive.empty: Babu wani abu da aka ajiye har yanzu.
settings.archive.slugTaken: Slug {slug} yayi alaƙa da kashi da ke tiyaga — zaɓi sabbin ɗaya
engines.title: Wajen injina
engines.help: Wanda aiki ke takawa kowane sashi na gida. Adiresoshi aiki ne na mashin; dutsaye nuna zuwa aiki na yanzu.
engines.remoteColdStart: Yana magana da MACU render-sabis API (:8779). Ɗari na farko bayan sabis ya fara ≈ 70 s (hasiya ta kernel).
engines.unreachable: ba a iya samun ta — fara sabis ko bincika URL
engines.envOverrideTip: Aka kulle shi da mai aiki girman jiya (.env / systemd) — kuɓaye abokin ciniki an bazzane shi yayin da aka saita.
settings.hf.title: Abokin ciniki Higgsfield.ai
settings.hf.help: Haɗa abokin ciniki Higgsfield.ai don ƙirƙira jita video, hoton jama'a, da jita masu layi-haɗa a kumolkumol. Yana amfani da abin kuɗi Higgsfield da credits.
settings.hf.openedTab: An buɗe tab na Higgsfield babbartawa.
settings.hf.pasteToggle: Matsala a haɗa? Ɗaura URL na juyya
settings.hf.pasteHelp: Idan shafin babbartawa ƙare a shafin da ba a iya samunta bayan ka yarda, jaki cikakkiyar URL na shafin daga mashafi kayan taba kuma ɗaura shi a nan.
settings.hf.modelsHelp: Abubuwan da akwai ga abokin ciniki. Zaɓi ɗaya kowace jita a Video → Ɗaura Jita (nau'i: higgsfield / lipsync). 👄 = karba waƙar sauti (za'a iya amfani dashi don lipsync).
settings.hf.modelsFailed: ba tiyata wa kuɓaya katakatakin katakatakin
settings.hf.lipsyncCapable: Yana karbar waƙar sauti — za'a iya amfani dashi don jita lipsync
update.setupIntro: Sakamakon shiryar da ke gida ba zai iya gama shi kanta ba (ba zai iya amfani da sudo). Daga foldan macu-pipeline, gida umarnin da ke ƙasa — ./deploy/install.sh babbur ne a sake gida kuma yana zazzage code sabon:
update.noticeIntro: Za ka iya sabunta da ɗaya buɗewa. Kawai lura:
video.cloudChipTitle: Jita Higgsfield kumolkumol: lissafi, ƙididdiyar credits don jita da ba a adana ba, da daidaitaccen kuɗi. Yankunan crop/trim ba ba za a sake jiya ba.
video.cloudChipIdleTitle: Higgsfield an haɗa. Ɗaura jita kumolkumol ta hanyar + Ɗaura Jita (nau'i: higgsfield ko lipsync); ƙididdiyar credits za ta bayyana a nan.
video.cloudChipDisconnectedTitle: Ƙirƙirar jita kumolkumol Higgsfield — haɗa abokin ciniki a Saiti → Higgsfield don amfani dashi.
video.kindLipsync: Jita lipsync (ɗauke sauti VO na cue)
video.cloudNoSeed: Abubuwan kumolkumol ba su ɗauki ajiya ba
video.cloudNeedsCue: Jita kumolkumol dole ne aka haɗa su da ƙira
video.addShotHelpCloud: Yana ƙirƙira jita ta hanyar kumolkumol ta Higgsfield (jiya kowace ƙirƙira; duba ☁ ƙididdiye). Bari catalan babu abubuwan da za a buɗewa. Hoton tushen ya sanya shi image-to-video.
video.addShotHelpLipsync: Yana maye gurbin jita cue tare da ƊAYA jita lipsync: hoton jama'a yana yin kari ɗauke cue VO. Kailai hoton tushen; VO mafi girma da ~12s aka raba kuma aka haɗa ta atomatik.
timeline.lipsyncSolo: Ƙira {cue} tana da jita lipsync — dole ne ta zama ɗaya jita a jita tasa (jita ta haɗa duka VO).
timeline.shotCloudTip: click don gyara crop/trim · tugs don motsi
metadata.shotEditHint: Cire, trim, kuma jangfada ana amfani dasu a taro daga jitatun adana — sunka gyara sun sanya wajen ba a sake jiya Higgsfield credits ba.
assembly.costError: Ƙididdiye ba akwai ba: {msg}. Zaka iya yin turewa — jita kumolkumol marasa adana za ta jiya abokin ciniki ku.
assembly.costInsufficient: Ƙididdiyar tsada sun hadu da daidaitaccen kuɗi. Turewa na iya buɗe a tsakani (kowane jita da ta gama ta zama adana).
assembly.costUnknowns: {n} jita da suke da tsada maraba (duba bayanin da ke sama) — dukkaninsu ne ƙaramin iyaka.
script.styleGuideTitle: Yadda mai kashi ya karanta jiya — buɗa Docs tab
tour.characters.title: Katakatakin jama'a
tour.characters.body: Jama'ar nuni tsakanin gida: yi hoton tushen tsakanin jiya a nan (gida ta hanyar ComfyUI, akan Higgsfield, ko akwati mai saurin taro), sannan ja jama'a a jitatun buɗi don image-to-video kuma lipsync jita.
characters.empty: Babu jama'a - yi sabon ɗaya, ko shiga daga buɗe ƙasa.
characters.deleteConfirm: Bude jama'a '{key}'? (da iya dawo daga characters/.trash-*)
characters.fieldCorePh: ana amfani dashi jita jita yayin da jita ba ta da wayewa nata
characters.fieldStillPromptPh: bayani na maɓugi jita na cikin shekarun 1970 a akwati taro… (tuɗa taro ƙasa)
characters.noTakes: Babu ɗaukannu - saita wayewa hoton kuma buɗe Ƙirƙira.
characters.genPromptPh: bari babu ne amfani da wayewa hoton
characters.usage.diverged: jita hoton buɗe na gida (ba daga katakatakin ba)
characters.useHelp: Jajagga ɗaukanni a cikin stills/ buɗe kuma haɗa jama'a a buɗe sa. Hoton ana saita sabon, don haka ba komai ba da sake jiya.
characters.useConfirm: Buɗe da ke nan ya kasansu da hoton daban-daban don jama'a.
characters.useInvalidates: Maye gurbin shi ya tafi {n} da jiya kumolkumol jita marasa adana stale — za su sake jiya akan turewa na gida: {shots}
characters.importHelp: Yana buɗi katakatakin ta daga buɗe da ke nan jama'a buɗe (wayewowa + jitatun da jiya su zama ɗaukanni-001). Jama'a da jiya akwai a katakatakin an bazzane shi.
video.stillNone: Babu hoton - aika jama'a kuma ƙirƙira ɗaukannu akan characters tab.
engines.claude.title: Claude Code
engines.claude.help: Haɗa masu aikin zuwa Studio MCP server, ko wajen kayan jiya (jita jajaggan, SFX shirye, karatu) ta hanyar abin kuɗi Claude - ba abubuwan gida ba kailai.
engines.claude.notInstalled: ba a tafo akan machin da - claude.com/claude-code
engines.claude.textgenHint: Gefe: saita kayan jiya sama zuwa "Claude Code" don ƙirƙira jita jajaggan tare da abin kuɗi Claude maimakon abubuwan Ollama gida — hannu a sauri sheryewa, kuma shi ya cilta GPU duka.
sync.title: Daidaita — {show}
sync.help: Yana jiyantawa da aikin nuni na buɗe (jiya, buɗe, tasniyoyi, rikodin jama'a) tare da sauran sanintatsa a hanyar macu-web haɗa. Abubuwan suna da auna (ɗaukannu, hoton, jitatou, muryoyi) suna tafi ta hanyar Shiga/Fita a kundin kasuwa.
sync.pullTitle: Za a ci (sabon akan sauran Studio)
sync.conflictTitle: Canja akan duka — sabon sai zai cinye
sync.conflictHelp: Asalin fayil kowace da jiya ana adana a gida a matsayin timestamp .bak kusa da asali.
sync.doneErrors: Daidaita an gama tare da {n} kuskurewa
sync.notConnected: Ba haɗe zuwa macu-web. Haɗa akan shafin Fita — Studio duka dole su amfani da maɓugin haɗa daya — sannan daidaita.
tour.sync.title: Hada
tour.sync.body: Daba daya tana daidaita rubutun nuni nan - alalle, abubuwan shawara, takaddun ilimi, bayanan halitta - tare da haɗin kusan yanar gida, duka gefen: yana sanin menene dona da menene karɓa kanta. Duk wajan kaɓe a kwanciyar gida; matsi mutu tare da Shidarwa / Buɗe daga menu jajere.
tour.cloud.title: Samar a sararin samaniya
tour.cloud.body: Za ka so ƙananan sitenni na bidiyo, ko koyi mai santsi ba tare da nauyin GPU? Jerin maƙera → Saitunan → Higgsfield yana haɗi da abokin Higgsfield.ai ku, sannan Saitunan → Injina yana aiki sitenni, bidiyo, ko lipsync zuwa sararin samaniya. Yana amfani da kusan krediti ku kanta, adana kowane hoto ko ba tu ba, kuma ya isa aiwoa.
wizard.characters.title: Gina ƙungiyar ku (ba dole ba)
wizard.characters.body: Buɗe tabin Halitta a mashirin sama don ba da gida-gida - "harsunan" - kawo a gida ko a sararin samaniya. Taba ilimi gida kuma ja halitta zuwa jaji don a kama a zane a kowa hoto. Ba dole ba, amma yana ajiye nuni dinka kan-model.
wizard.characters.goal: Halitta tare da aƙalla harsunan jiya
characters.identityEmpty: Babu Souls ko Elements har yanzu — ƙirƙira Element daga ɗaki (⧉) don ainihi da ake iya aiki dashi.
characters.hfNotConnected: Haɗa Higgsfield a cikin Saitunan don yin amfani da Souls/Elements.
characters.takeToElement: Ƙirƙira Element da ake iya aiki dashi daga wannan ɗaki
characters.trainSoulTitle: Horo Higgsfield Soul daga waɗannan ɗakoki don ainihi da ake iya aiki dashi
characters.trainSoulNeed: Aƙalla ɗaki 5 ake buƙata don horo Soul
characters.trainSoulConfirm: Horo Higgsfield Soul „{name}” daga {n} ɗakoki? (ina yin amfani da asusunka; yana aiki a baya)
characters.trainSoulStarted: Horo Soul „{name}” ya fara — zai bayyana a zaɓin ainihi lokacin da ya shigiya
characters.importHfEmpty: Babu jinatawa a asusunka na Higgsfield har yanzu.
characters.importHfHelp: Ƙirƙira kyauta a cikin rumbun waje na Higgsfield, sannan ja sakamakon nan gida — jerin + sauke ba za su kaita ba. Taɓa jinatawa don ƙari ta matsayin ɗaki.
settings.hf.unlimitedNote: Waje ne kawai — jinatawa ta ilo/API koyaushe ana kaita.
settings.hf.txnsTitle: Abubuwan jari na 'yan sani na kwanan nan
settings.hf.modelNeedsConnect: Haɗa Higgsfield don zaɓi ƙirƙirra da nau'i.
